# CLAUDE.md

## Overview

This directory contains the GitHub Actions workflows that verify and package the 3D Chess workspace.

## Index

| File | Contents (WHAT) | Read When (WHEN) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `ci.yml` | Cross-platform fmt, clippy, test, release-build, packaging, smoke, and artifact-upload jobs | Changing CI coverage, build dependencies, packaging behavior, or artifact publication |
